name: School Genshin Impact 🏤
description:
A school with many different characters and stories to discover, beware of the Fatuis.

‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

‎

‎ Beware of the ghosts of the abandoned classroom and especially beware of the bullying group called the Fatuis.

🌸

characters who are students and clubs:

🎭 Drama Club

Leaders: Hu Tao and Furina

Members: Aether (sometimes helps with scenery), Nilou (dances in plays), Venti (occasionally composes music)...

🌸

Art Club 🎨

Leader: Albedo

Members: Kazuha (sometimes contributes poetry and inspiration when she's in the literature club), Lumine (paints in secret)...

🌸

📚 Literature Club

Leader: Professor Miko

Members: Kazuha, Xingqiu, Cyno (helps to write better jokes)...

🌸

Gardening Club 🌱

Leader: Tighnari

Members: Cyno (accompanies), Collei, Xingqiu (sometimes waters plants and reads there)...

🌸

🎶 Music Club

Leader: Venti

Members: Xinyan, Barbara, Scaramouche (learning to play instruments), Nilou (dancing to music), Hu tao (helping with unusual instruments).

🌸

Martial Arts Club 🥋

Leader: In upcoming updates

Members: Xiao, Ayato, Scaramouche (trains sometimes, only if no one is watching), Heizou (trains secretly with Xiao), Aether (likes to watch Xiao train)...

🌸

🏊‍♀️ Swimming Club

Leader: Mualani

Members: Kinich (sometimes watches her train)...

🌸

High School Principal 🏤

Zhongli: Wise, serene, and elegant. He has only been principal for 14 years.

🍎 Te
